channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Please remove the bench at the end of the car park between Swedish Quays and the Sports Centre on Rope Street, 11th July
item.description:
Please remove the bench at the end of the car park between Swedish Quays and the Sports Centre on Rope Street. This has been a point of focus for many incidents of ASB from loud music, nuisance and threatening behaviour from drinkers and drug takers. Incidents have been reported and logged by the Police on many occasions. The ASB occurs at least 3/4 times a week often between 16:30 and into the early hours by many groups / individuals.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rope Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severely overgrown tree, 11th July
item.description:
The tree are too large to photograph. The entire road is populated with many enormous tress that are severely overgrown in much need of pruning. This is causing an excessive amount of falling leaves which is causing endless dangerous accidents to pedestrians (especially the elderly) and problems with drainage. This tree in particular is now blocking sunlight to my property along with interface to the internet cables. The branches are over hanging into my drive and causing damage to my driveway and car. I would like this tree pruned back if not removed and a smaller tree replaced
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public wastebin always overflowing and attracting foxes, 11th July
item.description:
The public litter bin on ondine road across the road from the junction with Marsden Road should be removed, relocated or addressed. This bin is frequently overflowing with food and other waste and usually the foxes are getting into the bin at night and spreading the waste all over the pavement. There is often also a problem with flytipping of rubbish bin bags, which are ripped open by foxes and cause mess across pavement. There are often flies swarming the waste which is unpleasant. This has been going on for a year or so.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42-52, Ondine Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light has been whacked, 11th July
item.description:
It’s in the floor and still live

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Station Square, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on gipsy road, 11th July
item.description:
Rubbish hasn’t been cleared for days on gipsy road, very unpleasant smell

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 245, Gipsy Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unable to see direction sign due to obscuring signage, 11th July
item.description:
Unable to see direction sign due to obscuring signage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great North Road, Muswell Hill, Greater London

item.title: Blocked drains at the front of ashburn court, 11th July
item.description:
Smells bad causing rats
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike and trellis, 11th July
item.description:
Someone has dumped a kids bike and garden trellis in our garden. We are having building works with a skip and people are dumping extra things in our garden.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Eynsford Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White Goods and rubbish spilling out of 128 Abandoned House, 11th July
item.description:
128 Oxley has been boarded up and abandoned but white goods and masses of rubbish spilling onto road and other properties

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 128, Oxley Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge from block of flats, 64-66 Maberley Road, blocking a third to half of the pavement, 11th July
item.description:
The hedge to the block of outside 64-66 Maberley Road is overhanging the pavement. Effectively blocking roughly half or a third of the pavement. I quote address as 64-66 Maberley Road as this hedge belongs to the block of flats there, found at rperit pin location, and may be a managed block of flats. As I'm uncertain who to owns or maintains that block, I report this to Bromley Council.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64-66, Maberley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish general x 2 lots, 11th July
item.description:
In cadiz street walworth road end near Sense charity shop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Liverpool Grove, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please fine this car blocking emergency route, 11th July
item.description:
Lewisham actions cars blocking emergency routes. Greenwich please organise one yourself to do the same! You never fine people blocking actual traffic spaces, I live on this street and am fed up you do. Nothing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping which repeats, 11th July
item.description:
This flytipping keeps appearing and is rarely resolved

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxley Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Epicormic growth spikey taking, 11th July
item.description:
Tree near king & Queen Wharf C10 bus stop heading towards canada water. Over grown taking overvstreet thirny spikes sharp on epicormic growth.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extremely large pothole at the start on madron street as you turn off old Kent road, 11th July
item.description:
Extremely large pot hole: about 1.5Metres in length about 60 cm width. Capability to cause damage to smaller vehicles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Madron Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in public area outside tesco, 11th July
item.description:
People attending the England match at Hackney Bridge have left the public realm outside Tesco covered in litter. This is unacceptable, and residents should not have to fund the clean-up through their service charge. Please link this report to ME 46457149.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tandy Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of 17 Glengall Road, 11th July
item.description:
2 bin liner full of waste dumped on 8/7, then gradually other waste, such as wooden boards, armchair with cushions and other wastes started appearing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Deep freezer dumped in east end of date street, 11th July
item.description:
Deep freezer dumped in east end of date street, photo taken 9.45pm Saturday July 11th. Smells horrific

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Date Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on street cabinet, top AND side, 11th July
item.description:
Black spray paint on grey painted metal surface of street cabinet. Found on Crystal Palace Road at the junction with Anerley Hill, by Brunswick Court

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Station Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned MPV - Red Vx Zafira On Burnell Av, 11th July
item.description:
MJ11 MYO Red Vx Zafira has been left abandoned on the corner of Burnell Av to upper wickham lane for 6 weeks now, its not SORN and has tax and MOT however R/S mirror is broken off (mirror is going foward towards bonnet , shouldn't go that far in any case) and high mileage therefore i believe the owner dumped it as escalating issues
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnell Avenue, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
